---
title: "CV"
format: 
  html:
    respect-user-color-scheme: true
    page-layout: article
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex">
---

```{=html}
<iframe src="/files/Fan_Yin_CV.pdf#toolbar=0," width="100%" height="100%" frameborder="no" border="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0"></iframe>
```

You can download a PDF copy of my CV [here](/files/Fan_Yin_CV.pdf){target="_blank"}.
